# Open Banking Platform — Demo Credit Union

> Open-source, multi-tenant digital banking platform. MIT licensed.

This is a demo instance of the Open Banking Platform, showcasing features with a fictional "Demo Credit Union" tenant.

## About Demo Credit Union (Sample Tenant)
Demo Credit Union is a fictional credit union used to demonstrate platform capabilities. In production, all content on these pages is configured per-tenant through the admin CMS and branding editor.

## Platform Features
- Consumer banking portal (accounts, transfers, bill pay, RDC, cards, loans)
- Admin console (user management, compliance, analytics, branding, CMS)
- Mobile app (iOS & Android via Flutter)
- AI-powered chat, insights, and automation
- Multi-tenant with per-tenant branding and integrations
- Adapter pattern for core banking, bill pay, RDC, cards, KYC, and more

## Contact (Demo)
- Email: support@example-cu.org
- Phone: (800) 555-0199
- Address: 100 Credit Union Way, Anytown, US 10001

## Source Code
This platform is open source under the MIT license.
Repository: https://github.com/openbanking-platform/digital-banking
